samples:
I close my eyes and see
The one that got away
It's our time to be
Together in spirit
Staying true to the end


My mind my soul they share
No way, no how, you'll replace
The one that I deserve
In mind, in spirit


When we were together
I knew it was so true
To find and keep the love
That I am feeling now

Time after time, place after place
I find myself thinking
What took you so long
To appear in my life
Be ourselves and be free


I open wide to scream
In death, your name is
Spirits of revenge
Forever to remain


When we were together
I knew it was so true
To find and keep the love
That I am feeling now
Spirit, may you rest in peace


Never knowing what hits
Your empty shell of a life
Never knowing what hit me
When you touched my soul
With your evil eyes

It is a test of power
Strength and will against will
One must fall, one must rise
And the pain intensifies


Spirit crying out in pain
Wishing for the end to come
Physically drained
Completely drained


Life as a corpse
Death comes slow
Drain the life away
Pain you know


Laying in your blood
Others are out to taste
Smell the stench
It's so addictive

The ritual is complete
A new life was created
From the flesh of a dead
Forgotten soul was created


Spirit crying out in pain
Wishing for the end to come
Physically drained
Completely drained


Life as a corpse
Death comes slow
Drain the life away
Pain you know


Laying in your blood
Others are out to taste
Smell the stench
It's so addictive


Soul reaping
Soul reaping
Soul reaping
Soul reaping


Sorrowful screams fill your mind
Controlling the minds of others
Death is oh so addictive
Once you have been addicted

A life of crime and misery
In the world of a human prey
Preying on the weak, the old
The young, the helpless, those that would be


Vulnerable to the ones that seek
To enslave, exploit, and to destroy


Human prey

What you cannot have, you want
What is not yours I need not
Release your mind from this cliche
And live without misery


Vulnerable to the ones that seek
To enslave, exploit, and to destroy


Human prey


Live how you want, but don't come
Crashing in my life as a mistake
Too late when you open wide
For the chance to make your choice

Vulnerable to the ones that seek
To enslave, exploit, and to destroy
Human prey
Sucking the life right out of a naive
Unaware human being
Torn apart by those with ulterior motives
Your future now takes its course
On the other hand you will learn to improve

Memory is all that's left behind
As I lay and wait to die
Little do they know
That I hear their choice of life


Life ends so fast
Fate was all around
Take your chance
It could be your last


I close my eyes
And prepare to pass away
My life I give
To see my flesh decay


Never knowing what hit you or me
When it comes to the end of our life
We will see who will open
Their eyes and open their mind

Once I had full control
Of when and how I would pass away
Now, I'm dependent on
The ones who have your choice today


Open wide so I can pass away
Release me from this lonely world
Open wide so I can pass away
Release me from this lonely world


I hear the choice that was just
Composed by those who now
Have full control of your fate
By which you will
Meet your fate


Life ends so fast
Fate was all around
Take your chance
It could be your last

Stories of death
Of those who lived and died before us
A matter of time
Until we'll join them


The past cannot be changed
So take hold of the present
Fate is in your hands


Live, see and feel
What it's like to die
It's all around us
Yet we don't seem to see


What would you do
If you knew how long you'd last
On this fucking earth?


When tomorrow comes
You will not return
Empty handed
Face reality


Take hold of the present
Fate is in your hands
Fate is in your hands

In dreams
I hear their voices calling my name
Calling me back
To the world of the
Dead

Never knowing what it's like
To die
People come and go
Some stay behind to collect the
Unfaithful ones



The past cannot be changed
So take hold of the present
Fate is your hands

Live, see and feel
What it's like to die
It's all around us
Yet we don't seem to see

Do you feel my judgment?
The kind that is justified
Yet, laced with prejudice


I am the one who is to be
Blamed for your mistakes
When I'm not around, people will
Step right up and attack


It comes as a real shock to me
That people cannot think
Or accept the truth about life

What has been done cannot be undone
People will pay for their mistake
By going through what I went through


When will they learn?
To face reality
Will it take forever?

I hold my hands upon my
Heart and my soul
In order to find the source of the
Hallowed guilt and pain


I can understand how it feels to be
Rejected by those that speak out
Against the ones that created the pain

It must suck to be naive
And have people justify
Your fault when it comes crashing down

It comes as a real shock to me
That people cannot think
Or accept the truth about life

What pain are you in
It must be so strange to not have lived this way
Ever knew what it was like to be in my shoes
Yet you speak so freely


If I could taste your pain
I might understand why you live the way you choose
But I know how it's done
So don't tell me how it's done
You know nothing at all about me or the life I’ve had
To stay so naive is a choice you decide to make


Life may seem so cruel but there's good
And there's bad and everything in between
The power to change things lies within yourself
No escaping from the real world, take my advice


If I could taste your pain
I might understand why you live the way you choose
But I know how it's done
So don't tell me how it's done
You know nothing at all about me or the life I've had
To stay so naive is a choice you decide to make

People from the land of pain
Come to seek advice from the
One whose lived the misery
Of being tortured for so long


Using their bodies as a weapon
They attack those who are close
Protecting them with razor-sharp claws
Which rip away at life with no remorse


It's an overactive imagination
That creates this mental obsession
A never-ending craving
For human sorrow and depression


Killing is oh so addictive
Release me from this sick obsession
I now behold my salvation


In their trance like hypnotic state
Time stands still, they cannot move
Observing the one whose spoken word
Controlling the destiny of another


Using their bodies as a weapon
They attack those who are close
Protecting them with razor-sharp claws
Which rip away at life with no remorse


It's an overactive imagination
That creates this mental obsession
A never-ending craving
For human sorrow and depression


Killing is oh so addictive
Release me from this sick obsession
I now behold my salvation

The one who was a friend
And now a distant memory
When did it begin
To turn into a nightmare


What has now been days, weeks, months
It seems like years to come
In this lonely world of ours
You'll find no escape from the

Power of the mind
Changing your tomorrow
No tomorrow
Fate is all around you


Time will always be our friend
Memories that cannot be erased
From the first day we met
Destiny struck its cross-fired axe


What has now been days, weeks, months
It seems like years to come
In this lonely world of ours
You'll find no escape from the power of the mind


If you could rewind time
Would you change how or when you live?
Too late for regrets
Now you have to face reality


What has now been days, weeks, months
It seems like years to come
In this lonely world of ours
You'll find no escape from the power of the mind

Hiding from the harsh reality
Of a world in need of change
Where corruption grows at lightning speed
And freedom is our slave


Laying your guilt and pain
On others that cannot help
What comes around goes around
To those who stood aside and did not help


It's sickening to see people suffer
When it is their time to die
In denial you deny the truth
By saying "oh God don't let me die"


So you have lived so far into the future
You now behold what life will be like
For those that are to come after you
This is what it takes to be free

Living in the age of technology
There is no tomorrow for those without
Human qualities, such as compassion
Which we once knew and now have lost


Laying your guilt and pain
On others that cannot help
What comes around goes around
To those who stood aside and did not help


It's sickening to see people suffer
When it is their time to die
In denial you deny the truth
By saying "oh God don't let me die
